title: clerodendrum serratum var. herbaceum
intro: Clerodendrum serratum var. herbaceum, also known as the small-leaf glorybower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. The plant is primarily used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. It is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. In traditional herbal preparations, Clerodendrum serratum var. herbaceum is often used in teas, infusions, and poultices, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
